titleZh: 隱私權與資訊安全政策
overviewEn: In order to safeguard your rights as a user and to ensure a secure browsing experience, the Department of Communications Design, Shih Chien University (SCCD) hereby publishes its privacy and information security policy. Please review the following provisions carefully when using this website.
overviewZh: 為保障您的權益並提供安全的瀏覽環境，實踐大學媒體傳達設計學系（SCCD）謹此公布本網站之隱私權與資訊安全政策，敬請於使用本網站時詳閱以下條款。

points.desEn: This policy applies to the collection, processing, and use of personal information arising from your use of services on this website. It does not apply to other Shih Chien University units, government agencies, or third-party websites linked from this site. When you follow links to external sites, please review the privacy policies of those sites separately.
points.desZh: 本政策適用於您使用本網站服務時，所涉及之個人資料蒐集、處理及運用。本政策不適用於與本網站連結之實踐大學其他單位網站、政府機關或第三方網站；當您經由本網站連結至其他網站時，請另行參閱該等網站之隱私權政策。

points.titleEn: Collection, Processing, and Use of Personal Information
points.titleZh: 個人資料之蒐集、處理與運用
points.desEn:
• When you merely browse this website or download files, no personal identification information is collected.
  • When you use online services (such as contact forms, admission inquiries, alumni registration, or event sign-ups), you may be asked to provide accurate personal information including your name, email address, telephone number, and message content. We reserve the right to decline service for information that is incomplete or untrue.
  • The server automatically logs visitor IP addresses, access times, page views, and download counts. These records are used solely for internal traffic analysis and are not associated with any identifiable individual.
  • For purposes of website management and service improvement, we conduct aggregate analysis of browsing behavior and access patterns; no individual user is profiled.
  • We may use third-party analytics services (such as Google Analytics) to analyze cookie information. Such providers do not obtain personally identifiable information through these cookies.
  • Collected personal information is handled in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act of the Republic of China (Taiwan) and related regulations. We do not sell, exchange, or lease your personal information to any third party, except: (a) when lawfully requested by judicial authorities, or (b) when required by competent authorities in the performance of statutory duties.
  • This website may embed third-party content (such as YouTube, Instagram, or Facebook). Please refer to the privacy policies of those platforms for their data practices.
  • When citing material from this website, please notify SCCD and clearly indicate the source. When reusing photographs, please respect the portrait rights of the subjects and applicable personal data protection laws.
points.desZh:
• 當您僅瀏覽本網站或下載檔案時，本網站不會蒐集任何個人身分資料。
  • 當您使用線上服務（如聯絡表單、招生諮詢、系友登錄或活動報名）時，可能需提供真實之個人資訊，包含姓名、電子郵件、聯絡電話及訊息內容；對於資料不完整或不實者，本網站保留拒絕提供服務之權利。
  • 伺服器將自動記錄瀏覽者之 IP 位址、瀏覽時間、頁面瀏覽次數及下載次數，相關紀錄僅供內部流量分析使用，不與任何可識別個人之資料相連結。
  • 基於網站經營與服務改善之目的，我們會就瀏覽行為與資訊查閱進行「總量分析」，不針對個別使用者進行剖析。
  • 本網站可能使用第三方分析服務（如 Google Analytics）以分析 cookie 資訊，該等服務提供者並不會藉由 cookie 取得可識別個人之資料。
  • 所蒐集之個人資料，依中華民國「個人資料保護法」及相關法令處理，不會任意出售、交換或出租予第三人。但有下列情形者除外：（一）配合司法機關之合法調查；（二）配合主管機關依職務需要之調查或使用。
  • 本網站可能嵌入第三方內容（如 YouTube、Instagram、Facebook 等），相關資料處理方式請參閱各該平台之隱私權政策。
  • 引用本網站資料時，請告知本系並註明出處；使用相關照片時，請尊重被攝影者之肖像權及個人資料保護相關法令。

points.desEn:
In order to provide you with the best service, this website may place cookies on your device for the following purposes:

  • To remember your language preference and viewing mode (light, inverse, or color theme) so that your settings persist across visits.
  • To compile aggregate statistics on visitor numbers and browsing patterns, used solely as a reference for improving service quality.
  • You may adjust your browser privacy settings to a higher level in order to refuse cookies. Please note that doing so may cause certain website features to function abnormally.
points.desZh:
為提供您最佳之服務，本網站可能於您的裝置中寫入及讀取 cookie，用途包括：

  • 記錄您所選擇之語言、顯示模式（如標準、反相或色彩主題），俾使設定可於再次造訪時延續。
  • 用於統計瀏覽人數及分析瀏覽模式，僅作為改善服務品質之參考。
  • 您可將瀏覽器隱私權等級設定為高，以拒絕接受 cookie，惟此舉可能導致本網站部分功能無法正常運作。

points.desEn:
• SCCD designates personnel responsible for the management and protection of personal information, with clearly defined responsibilities and obligations.
  • We comply with the requirements of the Personal Data Protection Act, periodically assess risks to personal information, and adopt appropriate technical and organizational security measures accordingly.
  • Access to personal information is granted on the principle of minimum necessity for the work concerned, with appropriate segregation of duties and periodic review of authorizations.
  • When the specific purpose of collection has ceased or the retention period has expired, personal information will be deleted or its processing and use will cease, either at our own initiative or upon request by the data subject; matters required by statutory duty or to which the data subject has consented are excepted.
  • In the event of a personal data incident, we will immediately activate emergency notification and response procedures, and handle the incident in accordance with applicable laws and regulations.
points.desZh:
• 本系指定專責人員負責個人資料之管理與保護工作，並明確劃分相關責任與義務。
  • 遵循「個人資料保護法」之要求，定期進行個人資料風險評估，並採取適當之技術與組織安全措施。
  • 個人資料之存取權限，依業務最小必要原則授予，並實施權責區隔與定期權限審查。
  • 個人資料蒐集之特定目的消失或保存期限屆滿時，本系將主動或依當事人請求，刪除或停止處理及利用；但法定職務必須或經當事人同意者，不在此限。
  • 如發生個人資料事故，將立即啟動緊急通報應變作業，並依相關法令處理。

points.desEn:
Any attempt to compromise the confidentiality, integrity, or availability of this website without authorization is prohibited and may be subject to legal liability under applicable laws. To safeguard the security of the website and its users, we have adopted the following measures, supported by the University's central information services:

  • Firewall protection to restrict access on specific ports and prevent unauthorized intrusion.
  • Network traffic monitoring to detect and block malicious activity.
  • Anti-virus and anti-malware software to provide a secure browsing environment.
  • Periodic vulnerability scanning of the network and systems, with timely patching and remediation.
  • Periodic backup of website data and configurations to a backup system, in order to ensure continuity of service.
  • Periodic review and update of this security policy in line with changes in technology and the threat landscape.
points.desZh:
禁止任何未經授權而企圖破壞本網站機密性、完整性及可用性之行為，違反者將依相關法令究辦。為維護本網站及使用者之安全，並配合本校資訊單位之整體規劃，本系已採取下列措施：

  • 裝設防火牆設備，限制特定通訊埠之連線，以防止非法入侵。
  • 監控網路流量，對惡意行為進行偵測與阻擋。
  • 裝設防毒及惡意程式防護軟體，以提供安全之瀏覽環境。
  • 不定期針對網路及系統進行弱點掃描，並適時修補與強化。
  • 定期備份網站資料與設定檔至備援系統，以維持服務之持續運作。
  • 定期檢視並更新本資訊安全政策，以因應技術與威脅之變化。

points.desEn:
In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act, you have the right to make the following requests with respect to your personal information held by us:

  • To enquire about or request a review of your personal information.
  • To request a copy of your personal information.
  • To request supplementation or correction of inaccurate information.
  • To request that collection, processing, or use of your information be ceased.
  • To request deletion of your personal information.
points.desZh:
依據「個人資料保護法」之規定，您就本系所保有之個人資料，享有下列權利：

  • 查詢或請求閱覽。
  • 請求製給複製本。
  • 請求補充或更正不正確之資料。
  • 請求停止蒐集、處理或利用。
  • 請求刪除您的個人資料。

points.desEn: This Privacy and Security Policy may be amended from time to time in response to changes in services, technology, or applicable laws. Any revisions will be posted on this page together with an updated revision date. You are encouraged to review this policy periodically.
points.desZh: 本隱私權與資訊安全政策得因應服務、技術或法令之變更而隨時修正，相關修正將公布於本頁面，並附上更新日期。建議您定期回顧本政策內容。

points.desEn: If you have any questions or comments regarding this Privacy and Security Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
points.desZh:
如您對本隱私權與資訊安全政策或我們的資料處理方式有任何疑問或建議，歡迎與我們聯繫：

Department of Communications Design, Shih Chien University

實踐大學媒體傳達設計學系

Email / 電子郵件: sccd@g2.usc.edu.tw

Tel / 電話: +886 2 2538 1111 #7211

Address / 地址: 5F, Building A, No.70, Dazhi Street, Zhongshan District, Taipei City 104336, Taiwan

地址：104336 台灣台北市中山區大直街 70 號 A 棟 5 樓

lastUpdatedZh: 最後更新日期：2026 年 5 月

overviewEn: The Department of Communications Design, Shih Chien University (SCCD) is committed to ensuring that this website is accessible to the widest possible audience, regardless of ability or technology. This website has been designed and developed in accordance with web accessibility design principles, so that visitors using assistive technologies, keyboard-only navigation, or alternative input devices may browse its content with ease.
overviewZh: 實踐大學媒體傳達設計學系（SCCD）致力於確保本網站之內容可為最廣泛之使用者所近用，不因其能力或所使用之科技而有所差異。本網站依循無障礙網頁設計原則進行規劃與建置，使使用輔助科技、僅以鍵盤操作或其他替代輸入裝置之訪客，亦能順利瀏覽網站內容。

points.desEn:
In designing this website, we have implemented the following four key accessibility principles:

  • Keyboard navigation: Every page on this website can be operated using the keyboard alone, without reliance on a pointing device such as a mouse.
  • Access keys: The website provides standard access keys (also represented in Taiwan as ":::") that allow visitors to jump quickly to the main areas of each page.
  • Image alternatives: Meaningful images on the website are accompanied by appropriate alternative text descriptions, so that the information they convey is available to users of screen readers.
  • Link previews: Links that change the interface, navigate to a different address, or open in a new window are accompanied by descriptive text indicating their behavior, so that users know what to expect before activating them.
points.desZh:
本網站於設計時導入下列四項無障礙原則：

  • 鍵盤操作支援：本網站所有頁面均可僅以鍵盤操作，不限於使用滑鼠等指向裝置。
  • 導盲快速鍵：本網站提供標準快速鍵（於台灣亦以「:::」表示），供使用者快速跳至各主要區塊。
  • 圖片替代文字：本網站之有意義圖片均提供適當之替代文字說明，俾使螢幕閱讀器使用者可獲取同等資訊。
  • 連結提示：凡介面變更、網址變更或於新視窗開啟之連結，均附加提示文字，使使用者於點擊前即可了解其行為。

points.desEn: This website aims to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA, and is aligned with the Web Accessibility Guidelines issued by Taiwan's National Communications Commission (NCC). These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities and more usable for all visitors.
points.desZh: 本網站致力於符合 WCAG 2.1 AA 級之網頁內容無障礙指引，並對齊台灣國家通訊傳播委員會（NCC）所訂之無障礙網頁規範。該等指引說明如何使網頁內容對身心障礙者更易於近用，並使整體使用者體驗更為友善。

points.desEn:
For clarity and ease of navigation, each page on this website is organized into three main blocks:

  • Top block: Site header and main navigation menu.
  • Main content block: The primary content of each individual page.
  • Bottom block: Site footer, related links, and contact information.
points.desZh:
為便於瀏覽與導覽，本網站每一頁面均區分為三大區塊：

  • 上方區塊：網站頁首與主要導覽選單。
  • 主要內容區塊：各頁面之主要內容。
  • 下方區塊：網站頁尾、相關連結與聯絡資訊。

points.desEn:
In accordance with Taiwan's accessibility conventions, this website supports the following standard access keys:

  • Alt + U: Jump to the top block (main navigation).
  • Alt + C: Jump to the main content block.
  • Alt + Z: Jump to the bottom block (footer).
  • Tab: Move forward through interactive elements.
  • Shift + Tab: Move backward through interactive elements.
  • Enter / Space: Activate the focused link or button.
points.desZh:
本網站依台灣無障礙慣例，提供下列標準快速鍵：

  • Alt + U：跳至上方區塊（主導覽選單）。
  • Alt + C：跳至主要內容區塊。
  • Alt + Z：跳至下方區塊（頁尾）。
  • Tab：向後移動至下一個互動元件。
  • Shift + Tab：向前移動至上一個互動元件。
  • Enter / Space：啟動目前所聚焦之連結或按鈕。

points.desEn:
In addition to the principles above, this website incorporates the following features:

  • Semantic HTML structure for compatibility with screen readers.
  • Sufficient color contrast between text and background.
  • Resizable text without loss of content or functionality.
  • Visible focus indicators on all interactive elements.
  • Bilingual content presented in both English and Traditional Chinese.
  • Multiple display modes (standard, inverse, and color themes) so that visitors may select the appearance most comfortable to them.
points.desZh:
除前述原則外，本網站另提供下列無障礙功能：

  • 採用語意化 HTML 結構，以相容於螢幕閱讀器。
  • 文字與背景具備充足之色彩對比。
  • 文字可縮放且不影響內容與功能。
  • 所有互動元件均具備可見之焦點指示。
  • 內容以英文與繁體中文雙語呈現。
  • 提供多種顯示模式（標準、反相與色彩主題），俾使用者依個人偏好選擇最為舒適之呈現方式。

points.desEn:
Despite our best efforts, certain content may have known accessibility limitations:

  • Decorative animations and randomized layouts (such as the footer scatter or generative artworks) may not be fully navigable by assistive technologies; equivalent text-based content is provided where reasonably possible.
  • Embedded third-party content (such as YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook) is subject to the accessibility provisions of those external platforms.
  • Generated artworks on the Create page rely on an HTML canvas element; the underlying mode and color choices remain operable via keyboard.
points.desZh:
儘管我們已盡力提升無障礙性，部分內容仍存在以下已知限制：

  • 裝飾性動畫與隨機版面（如頁尾散佈元件、生成藝術作品）可能無法完全透過輔助科技瀏覽；於可行範圍內，我們已提供等效之文字內容。
  • 嵌入之第三方內容（如 YouTube、Instagram、Facebook）之無障礙性，受該等外部平台之相關規範影響。
  • Create 頁面之生成藝術依賴 HTML canvas 元素；其底層之模式與色彩選擇仍可透過鍵盤操作。

points.desEn: This website is reviewed periodically by the department in line with Taiwan's web accessibility standards. We continually monitor and improve the website's accessibility, and welcome reports of any verified accessibility issues so that they can be addressed.
points.desZh: 本網站依台灣無障礙網頁規範定期由本系進行檢視，並持續監控與改善網站之無障礙性。對於使用過程中所遇之無障礙問題，亦歡迎您向我們反映，俾利我們進行改善。

points.desEn:
We welcome your feedback regarding the accessibility of this website. If you encounter any accessibility barriers, or if you have suggestions for improvement, please contact us using the information below.

Department of Communications Design, Shih Chien University

We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within five working days, and will work to address verified issues in a timely manner.
points.desZh:
歡迎您針對本網站之無障礙性提供意見回饋。若您於使用過程中遇有任何無障礙障礙或有改善建議，請以下列方式與我們聯繫：

實踐大學媒體傳達設計學系

Email / 電子郵件: sccd@g2.usc.edu.tw

Tel / 電話: +886 2 2538 1111 #7211

Address / 地址: 5F, Building A, No.70, Dazhi Street, Zhongshan District, Taipei City 104336, Taiwan

地址：104336 台灣台北市中山區大直街 70 號 A 棟 5 樓

我們將盡力於 5 個工作天內回應您所提供之無障礙意見，並儘速處理已確認之問題。

points.desEn: This Accessibility Statement is reviewed periodically and updated as the website evolves. The date shown at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.
points.desZh: 本無障礙聲明將定期檢視，並隨網站之演進進行更新。本頁頂端所示日期，即為本聲明最近一次修訂之日期。

lastUpdatedZh: 最後更新日期：2026 年 5 月
